ddls:
CREATE TABLE "garment_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Size, Bust, Length) */,
  "x_small" TEXT /* Measurement for X-Small size */,
  "small" TEXT /* Measurement for Small size */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Measurement for Medium size */,
  "large" TEXT /* Measurement for Large size */,
  "x_large" TEXT /* Measurement for X-Large size */,
  "xx_large" TEXT /* Measurement for XX-Large size */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_types" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "garment_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the garment type (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the garment type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the garment type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garments" (
  "garment_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment item */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the garment */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the garment */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the garment */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for unique identification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the garment item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the garment item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES garment_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "garment_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment item */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment item in stock */,
  "stock_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., in stock, out of stock, backordered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_garment_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_item_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the warehouse entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the warehouse entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, sales) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
